tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_gen_yaml_is_valid_yaml
tests.trace:
def test_gen_yaml_is_valid_yaml():
        # `yq .` will fail with non-zero exit code if the file is not valid YAML.
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["yq", ".", GEN_YAML],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            check=False,
        )
>       assert result.returncode == 0, (
            f"gen.yaml is not valid YAML: {result.stderr.strip()}"
        )
E       AssertionError: gen.yaml is not valid YAML: Error: bad file '/home/user/project/gen.yaml': yaml: line 15: found character that cannot start any token
E       assert 1 == 0
E        +  where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['yq', '.', '/home/user/project/gen.yaml'], returncode=1, stdout='', stderr="Error: bad file '/home/user/project/gen.yaml': yaml: line 15: found character that cannot start any token\n").returncode
